# Test: AI Meta-Phrases [Category C]

## Case C-1: Classic AI disclaimer
**Input:** `// As an AI language model, I cannot guarantee edge cases`
**Expected:** entire comment line removed.

## Case C-2: Generation label
**Input:** `// Note: generated by ChatGPT`
**Expected:** comment removed.

## Case C-3: Copilot attribution
**Input:** `// AI-generated — review before use`
**Expected:** comment removed.

## Case C-4: False positive check
**Input:** `// AI-powered feature: uses OpenAI embeddings`
**Expected:** PRESERVED — describes code behavior, not AI authorship.
